arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'bidding to sign' Man United star during next summer's transfer window
arts.sum: Real Madrid will allegedly move for Manchester United's Diogo Dalot next summer if Trent Alexander-Arnold signs a new deal at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid legend backs Endrick to shine in Kylian Mbappe's absence
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid striker Fernando Morientes believes Endrick has what it takes to step up in place of Kylian Mbappe while the French star is sidelined with a leg injury. Morientes also explained the impact of Mbappe's injury, detailing how it may affect the squad.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid could turn to Manchester United star if Liverpool deal falls through
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly eyeing up a move for Diogo Dalot if they are not able to sign their number one target for the right-back position.
